paper_title: FNAS: Uncertainty-Aware Fast Neural Architecture Search

key_components.name: Uncertainty-Aware Critic (UAC)
key_components.purpose: Learn the architecture-performance joint distribution from previous search processes in an unbiased manner

key_components.name: Architecture Knowledge Pool (AKP)
key_components.purpose: Restore block-level parameters and transfer parameter knowledge across different searching settings and tasks

problems_addressed: RL-based NAS requires unbearable computing resources
One-shot NAS has issues with inaccurate performance estimation due to weight sharing
key_observations: Optimal architectures for different tasks have common architecture knowledge
Parameter knowledge (weights) can be transferred across different searching settings and tasks

computational_cost.original_cost: 64 TPUv2 devices for 96 hours or 20,000 GPU hours on V100

title: FNAS: Uncertainty-Aware Fast Neural Architecture Search
